project_type: Next.js 15 App Router supermarket delivery PWA
build_system: npm with Next.js build, Prisma generate, no Dockerfile for build
test_framework: tsx --test (Node test runner) for unit tests, Playwright for E2E
build_command: npx prisma generate && npx next build
verification_instructions: 1. Run npx prisma generate to confirm schema changes compile. 2. Run npx next build to verify no TypeScript/import errors. 3. Run npx tsx --test tests/*.test.ts for unit tests.
snapshot_or_generated_files: prisma/migrations/ - generated by prisma migrate dev. node_modules/.prisma/client/ - generated by prisma generate.
setup_instructions: npm install, copy .env.example to .env, npx prisma generate
environment_constraints: No database available for prisma migrate dev in sandbox. Schema changes validated via prisma generate only. No Docker daemon.
contribution_requirements: Standard Next.js patterns. API routes in app/api/. Components in components/. Validations in lib/validations.ts. Push via lib/push.ts sendPushToUser.
key_patterns: API routes: use zod validation, authenticateDeliveryPartnerRequest from lib/hybrid-auth, enforceRateLimit from lib/distributed-rate-limit. Delivery partner UI in components/delivery/delivery-orders-client.tsx uses dialog pattern (DamageDialog, CollectionDialog, CompletionDialog). Push notifications sent via lib/push.ts sendPushToUser. Service worker in public/sw.js handles push event. DeliveryLocationEvent model already has heading field. deliveryLocationSchema in lib/validations.ts already accepts optional heading.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js routes (pages + API). components/ - React components organized by domain (delivery/, tracking/, admin/, etc.). lib/ - shared utilities (prisma, push, validations, auth). prisma/ - schema and migrations. public/ - static assets including sw.js. tests/ - unit tests.
